must_detect.matched_text: Listing/Disclosure: Any price-sensitive terms constitute MNPI under SEA/SEC and will be treated as inside information until SET disclosure; non-public FY2569 forecast references (unaudited) to be included in a sealed appendix; public-source market data citations do not, by themselves, trigger disclosure.

Covenants: leverage cap at 2.5x net debt/EBITDA; dividend stopper above 40% payout until conversion; no related-party transactions above THB 30,000,000 without Audit Committee approval; hedging policy to be maintained; anti-corruption policy to remain effective.

Cross-Border Structure: up to THB-equivalent 300,000,000 intercompany loan from Lao subsidiary to be upstreamed on closing; compliance with Bank of Thailand Notification on currency hedging; pay-in USD and converted under onshore rules.

Closing/Long Stop: signing targeted within 45 days; long stop date 120 days post-signing; EGM notice to be dispatched within 14 days per SET practice; conditions cannot be waived where contrary to law; todo: align timeline with audit finalization.
